metaTitle: PDF Splitter — Split & Extract PDF Pages (Free, Private & Offline)
metaDescription: Split PDF files into separate pages or extract specific page ranges instantly in your browser. 100% private — your documents never leave your device. No limits.
introSummary: Our professional PDF Splitter is the ultimate tool for precise document management and absolute data privacy. Whether you need to extract a single signature page from a 50-page contract, divide a massive corporate report into individual chapters, or split a scanned document into separate files, our tool handles it all on-device. Using high-performance client-side processing, we ensure your sensitive legal and financial PDFs are never uploaded to a server, providing a secure and instantaneous 'Serverless' experience.

contextUsage.title: For Legal & Contract Management
contextUsage.desc: Quickly extract only the relevant pages or annexes from a long legal agreement to share with specific stakeholders securely.

contextUsage.title: For Business & Accounting
contextUsage.desc: Separate a bulk scan of multiple invoices or receipts into individual PDF files for easier digital filing and expense tracking.

contextUsage.title: For Students & Researchers
contextUsage.desc: Extract specific chapters or diagrams from large academic journals and textbooks to create focused study materials with smaller file sizes.

howto.description: Drag and drop your PDF or click to select. Our local engine parses the document structure instantly without any server-side lag.
Choose your method: 'Extract Ranges' (e.g., 1-5, 10), 'Split Every N Pages' (e.g., every 2 pages), or 'Divide into Equal Parts'.
Use the visual thumbnail preview to confirm you are splitting the correct sections. You can see exactly which pages will be included in the output.
Click 'Split PDF'. The separated files are generated in your browser memory and downloaded as a single PDF or a ZIP archive for your convenience.

why: Privacy-First Architecture — Your files are processed locally via WebAssembly. Sensitive documents never touch the cloud, ensuring 100% confidentiality.
Versatile Split Modes — Full flexibility to extract specific ranges, split by fixed intervals, or divide documents into equal segments automatically.
Zero Quality Loss — We use direct stream extraction. This means your text remains searchable and images stay crisp with absolutely no re-compression.
Batch Page Extraction — Save time by extracting multiple non-consecutive pages (e.g., pages 1, 4, and 7-10) into a single new document in one go.
No Size or Usage Limits — Split even the largest PDF files without worrying about 'Premium' tiers or daily file count restrictions.
Works Offline — Once the page is loaded, the entire splitting logic remains functional without an internet connection—ideal for high-security environments.

faq.q: Is it safe to split my confidential bank statements here?
faq.a: Yes. This is a 'Serverless' utility. Unlike other PDF sites, your file stays in your browser's sandbox. We have zero access to your data.

faq.q: Can I extract just one specific page?
faq.a: Absolutely. Just enter the page number (e.g., '5') in the range field, and the tool will create a new PDF containing only that single page.

faq.q: What is the benefit of 'Split Every N Pages'?
faq.a: This is perfect for batch processing. For example, if you have a 100-page file containing 50 two-page invoices, setting N to '2' will give you 50 separate files instantly.

faq.q: Will the split files be smaller in size?
faq.a: Yes. Since you are only keeping a portion of the original document, the resulting files will have significantly smaller footprints, making them easier to email.

faq.q: Do I need to install any software or plugins?
faq.a: No. Our PDF Splitter works natively in any modern web browser using standard Web APIs. No installation or registration is required.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Native-speed document processing directly in the browser
Maintains original fonts, links, and metadata in every split part
Ensures no trace of your document remains after the tab is closed
Handles multiple output files efficiently for batch tasks
Compatible with all professional PDF standards

troubleshooting: Range error appearing? Double-check that your page numbers exist in the document (e.g., don't ask for page 20 in a 15-page PDF).
ZIP file download blocked? Some corporate firewalls or browsers block automatic ZIP downloads. Check your browser's 'Downloads' icon for a permission prompt.
Document is read-only? If your PDF has a 'Content Extraction' restriction, you must unlock the file before the splitter can separate the pages.
proTips: Combine ranges! You can type '1-3, 5, 10-12' to grab the introduction, a specific chart, and the conclusion all into one concise PDF.
If you are splitting a very large book, use the 'Equal Parts' mode to divide it into manageable 50MB chunks for easier reading on mobile devices.
Since this tool works offline, it is the safest way to prepare sensitive documents for legal discovery or government submissions without risking external data leaks.
